data.body: [enwiki] Vyzhnytsia National Nature Park — I don't know who thought this park's size was almost twice that of the entire European Union (why apply to join the EU when you've got it twice at home lol), but I suspect some outdated figure was mistranslated or miscalculated. ukwiki says '11238 га', which means 11,238 hectares, or 112.38 km2.
data.author: Nederlandse Leeuw
data.title: Vyzhnytsia National Nature Park
